mainEntity.name: Does Utah workers' comp cover PTSD from chemical exposure trauma?
mainEntity.text: Does Utah workers' comp cover PTSD from chemical exposure trauma?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, if PTSD is compensable mental condition directly from physical exposure injury, per Utah appellate cases.

suggestedAnswer.text: Pure psych claims barred; needs physical link like spill panic. Farmington cases require psychiatrist IME. Insurers deny as pre-existing—prove aggravation. Benefits include therapy; appeals succeed with records.

name: PTSD Claims from Chemical Exposure in Utah Workers' Comp
description: Yes, if PTSD is compensable mental condition directly from physical exposure injury, per Utah appellate cases.
